title: The Horn Blows at Midnight
writer: Sam Hellman, James V. Kern, Aubrey Wisberg
actors: Jack Benny, Alexis Smith, Dolores Moran
plot: A trumpet player in a radio orchestra falls asleep during a commercial and dreams he's Athanael, an angel deputized to blow the Last Trumpet at exactly midnight on Earth, thus marking the end of the world.
